name: Fresh Peach Pie 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine 3/4 cup of sugar, cornstarch, and water. Stir until the cornstarch is dissolved.
2. Finely chop or crush three of the peaches. Add them to the cornstarch mixture with lemon juice.
3. Add salt, nutmeg, and red food coloring. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until thick and clear. Stir constantly during cooking.
4. Allow the mixture to cool. Slice the remaining peaches and arrange them on the bottom of the baked pie shell.
5. Sprinkle about 1/4 cup sugar over the sliced peaches (less if peaches are very sweet).
6. Spoon the cooked mixture onto the sliced peaches.
7. Refrigerate for several hours before serving. Top with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream, if desired.
